name: Momopet
address: 17145 Von Karman Ave Ste 104, Irvine, CA 92614-0907

health_requirement.title: Health Requirements
health_requirement.body: We kindly accept only healthy cats with calm, friendly temperaments for grooming appointments. Please make sure your cat is free from fleas, ticks, or any health issues before scheduling.

late_fee.title: Late Fee Policies
items: If you arrive more than 30 minutes late, a late fee of $25 will be charged.
